entities.description: The primary crop studied for root and stalk rot reaction

entities.description: The characteristic of not undergoing senescence in sorghum genotypes

entities.description: A disease affecting the roots of sorghum

entities.name: STALK ROT
entities.description: A disease affecting the stalks of sorghum

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: TOOTHPICK INOCULATION METHOD
entities.description: A technique used to inoculate pathogens into the plant

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environmental setting where the screening was performed

entities.name: SORGHUM GENOTYPES
entities.description: Specific varieties of sorghum including Q 101, Q 102, Q 103, Q 104, and PQ 54

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist stalk rot pathogens

entities.name: GREENER LEAF AREA
entities.description: The presence of more green leaf area at physiological maturity

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The stage of plant development when the plant has reached full growth

entities.name: E 36-1
entities.description: A specific sorghum genotype known for stalk rot resistance

entities.name: FUSARIUM MONILIFORME
entities.description: A specific pathogen that causes stalk rot in sorghum

entities.name: STALK ROT PATHOGENS
